title: 'Hour' Question in WorkForms
excerpt: I love the new Hour column type, and it would be such a big win for our organization to have this column type supported within WorkForms! We use Monday to help us plan and coordinate events, and we need to designate Even…

posts.author: Jess1 (Jessica Rapozo-Hansford)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the new Hour column type, and it would be such a big win for our organization to have this column type supported within WorkForms! We use Monday to help us plan and coordinate events, and we need to designate Event Start time, Set Up time, and End time, (& Sometimes Food Service Time). We’re currently able to use the ‘Date’ question and require the time input, however since all of our events are single day events - this solution is a little clunky and my team has expressed their displeasure w/ having to input the same date several times when ultimately all we need is the Hour/Minute input. Sometimes, in a rush to complete the form, a user will input the wrong date in the ‘Set up’ or ‘Food Service’ Date/time question and that effects an automation I’ve created to sort events into certain groups. Thank you for your consideration!

posts.author: RobbenR (RobbenR)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t fully understand why this column isn’t available in the work-from view. Shouldn’t all standard columns be available in these views?

posts.author: ShirMishalyExterman (Shir MIshaly Exterman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Monday team- I relate to this request- can you please add this option to the workforms?
